_note: Singapore public holidays as YYYY-MM-DD (local). On these dates the app shows the 'Sun / PH' schedule. Refreshed automatically by scripts/fetch_data.py from the Nager.Date API (https://date.nager.at/) — dates are the observed holiday (a Sunday holiday's in-lieu Monday is included). Lunar/Islamic holidays are the source's best estimate and can occasionally differ by a day from MOM's gazette (https://www.mom.gov.sg/employment-practices/public-holidays); edit this file by hand if you need to override one.
